headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 18, 2026**
article:
The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets, securing a 12-4 victory. Moisés Ballesteros led the Mets' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 3 RBIs. The Baltimore Orioles secured a hard-fought win against the Cleveland Guardians, outscoring them 6-4. Daniel Schneemann led the Orioles' offense with a standout performance, recording 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs in 4 at-bats. The Atlanta Braves shut out the Philadelphia Phillies 9-0, with Austin Riley leading the Braves' offense with two home runs and four RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. The Philadelphia Phillies placed RHP Jhoan Duran on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain. The Chicago White Sox transferred RHP Prelander Berroa to the 60-day injured list for Tommy John surgery recovery. The Chicago Cubs transferred RHP Cade Horton to the 60-day injured list due to a right forearm strain. The New York Mets placed 2B Jorge Polanco on the 10-day injured list with a right wrist contusion.

There have been several trades and roster movements across the league. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers. The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money. The Cincinnati Reds traded 1B Christian Encarnacion-Strand to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Cubs Cruise Past Mets 12-4**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets, securing a 12-4 victory. Moisés Ballesteros led the Mets' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Guardians in Thrilling 6-4 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a hard-fought win against the Cleveland Guardians, outscoring them 6-4. Daniel Schneemann led the Orioles' offense with a standout performance, recording 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs in 4 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Braves Shut Out Phillies 9-0**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves dominated the Philadelphia Phillies, securing a 9-0 victory. Austin Riley led the Braves' offense with two home runs and four RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Nationals 10-5**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 10-5 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Logan Webb earning the win. Heliot Ramos led the Giants' offense with a home run, four RBIs, and a walk that scored a crucial run.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Royals 13-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, securing a 13-4 victory. Impact hitters for the Yankees included Carter Jensen, Amed Rosario, Cody Bellinger, Ben Rice, José Caballero, and J.C. Escarra, while Will Warren was a standout on the mound.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Twins in Thrilling 5-4 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a narrow win over the Minnesota Twins, with Eugenio Suárez and Nathaniel Lowe contributing key hits in the contest. Josh Bell also made an impact for the Reds in their 5-4 victory.

top_news.title: **Phillies RHP Jhoan Duran Lands on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Philadelphia Phillies right-hander Jhoan Duran has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain, with the move retroactive to April 15, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade. McDermott joins the Dodgers after being dealt from the Baltimore Orioles.
